ogTitle: Phillip Bay vs Piallamore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Phillip Bay and Piallamore.
heading: Phillip Bay vs Piallamore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Phillip Bay, New South Wales and Piallamore, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Piallamore has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Phillip Bay (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Phillip Bay or Piallamore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Phillip Bay has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Piallamore scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Phillip Bay scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Piallamore scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Phillip Bay or Piallamore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Piallamore has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
